title: Stage map for real Workbench General Task intake and active-state registration

stages.title: Define Workbench intake and active-state contract
stages.purpose: Specify exact repo-safe artifacts and fields for Workbench General Task intake and active_state.json.
scope_in: normalized General Task artifact path rules
expected_outputs: schema/state contract documented in modernized task or schema file
required_checks: active state schema has ready_for_agent=false invariant
no downstream stage map/servitor scope included
stages.pass_condition: Contract clearly defines active-state-only registration and cannot be confused with agent readiness.
stages.fail_condition: Registration remains ambiguous or READY_FOR_AGENT can become true.

stages.title: Implement real Workbench General Task intake persistence
stages.purpose: Make Owner-entered General Task data persist as a real normalized artifact instead of placeholder UI success.
scope_in: write deterministic repo-safe General Task artifact
stages.pass_condition: Save/intake produces persisted artifact plus receipt and validation pass.
stages.fail_condition: Workbench claims success without artifact, receipt, and validation.

stages.title: Write active_state.json from real intake and selected task
stages.purpose: Create stale-aware dashboard active state with exact IDs, git truth, hashes, and READY_FOR_AGENT=false.
stages.pass_condition: active_state.json proves local Workbench state only and remains stale-aware.
stages.fail_condition: State lacks provenance, becomes stale-hidden, or implies worker readiness.

stages.title: Add checker and receipt guard layer
stages.purpose: Prevent fake green by checking placeholder UI, repo purity, UTF-8, Speculum import, and active state.
required_checks: Speculum review is imported and reflected
stages.pass_condition: All required guards produce explicit pass/fail evidence and Owner manual gate remains required.
stages.fail_condition: Any checker missing, fake-green-prone, or hiding warning/blocker state.

final_stage_map_pass_condition: Stage map has exactly 4 bounded stages
Speculum stage review is required before registration
